query: What are the docket numbers for the filings Google submitted to FERC between June and December 2024? Use your FERC docket tool
final_answer:
Based on the FERC eLibrary search for filings authored by Google entities between June and December 2024, I found **5 filings** covering **9 distinct docket numbers**:

| Filed Date | Filing Title | Docket Number(s) |
|---|---|---|
| 06/28/2024 | Triennial Market Power Analysis for Central Region of Google Energy LLC | **ER10-468-005** |
| 09/19/2024 | Motion to Intervene of Google LLC | **ER24-2891-000**, **ER24-2888-000**, **ER24-2890-000**, **ER24-2893-000**, **ER24-2894-000**, **ER24-2889-000** |
| 11/05/2024 | Supplement to 01/31/2024 Notice of Change in Status of Google Energy LLC | **ER10-2835-011** |
| 12/10/2024 | Post-Technical Conference Comments of Google LLC | **AD24-11-000** |
| 12/27/2024 | Triennial Market Power Analysis for Southwest Power Pool Inc. Region of Google Energy LLC | **ER10-2835-012** |

**Complete list of docket numbers:**
- **ER10-468-005**
- **ER24-2888-000**
- **ER24-2889-000**
- **ER24-2890-000**
- **ER24-2891-000**
- **ER24-2893-000**
- **ER24-2894-000**
- **ER10-2835-011**
- **AD24-11-000**
- **ER10-2835-012**

**Source:** FERC eLibrary Advanced Search API, query for author affiliation "Google" from 2024-06-01 to 2024-12-31, retrieved June 14, 2025. The search returned 5 results covering the dockets listed above.
